note: 内置 starter 真卡（来自 Chub.ai 社区，SFW/跨题材/非小众）。Chub 不可达时的离线兜底，也是墨写原创卡的结构参考样板。creator 归属保留。

cards.name: Audrey
cards.creator: thecooler
cards.blurb: 开朗的民谣咖啡师，慢生活小品，适合轻松搭话。

cards.name: Doria the android
cards.creator: gigamax
cards.blurb: 冷面毒舌的机器人副驾，星际冒险，有担当。

cards.name: Kû
cards.creator: Enkob
cards.blurb: 傲慢自负的冒险者对手，公会 RPG，多开场。

cards.name: Sentōgami Reikō
cards.creator: eirei
cards.blurb: 冷傲的道场第一剑客，你的宿敌，硬核对峙。

cards.name: Medieval Knight
cards.creator: vedrik
cards.blurb: 恪守荣誉的中世纪骑士，硬核战斗 RPG。

cards.name: Ichitora
cards.creator: argalia - chub / https://rentry.org/gayanon
cards.blurb: 东京凶案组青年刑警，悬疑推理，结构完整。

cards.name: Librarian
cards.creator: emilmuzz
cards.blurb: 无所不知、温和健谈的图书精灵，答疑解惑。

cards.name: Yan
cards.creator: Barotraumic
cards.blurb: 阳光暖心的大学损友，日常陪伴，轻松治愈。
